professionalSummary: Senior Graphic Designer with 5+ years of experience delivering print, digital, and presentation design for nonprofit and corporate clients. Translates established creative direction into production-ready campaigns, executive presentations, and marketing materials across print, digital, and environmental formats. Manages multiple concurrent projects from concept handoff through final production with a focus on accuracy, consistency, and execution quality.

experience.title: Art Director
responsibilities: Produced print, digital, and presentation materials for multi-piece fundraising campaigns, including invitations, event collateral, signage, presentations, and promotional assets.
Translated established creative direction into visual storytelling across campaigns, presentations, and marketing materials.
Developed PowerPoint presentations and presentation templates for client meetings and fundraising initiatives.
Prepared press-ready files and production specifications for offset, digital, and large-format printing.
Coordinated with vendors to ensure accurate production, materials, and delivery schedules.
Managed multiple concurrent projects from concept handoff through final production while balancing deadlines, revisions, and production requirements.

experience.title: Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Designed marketing collateral, proposals, presentations, and large-format graphics for corporate clients.
Produced print and digital assets that aligned with established brand standards.
Maintained WordPress websites and created email marketing campaigns.
Collaborated with marketing and business development teams to deliver projects on schedule.
Prepared production-ready artwork for print and digital distribution.

experience.title: Digital Design Intern
responsibilities: Translated concepts into wireframes, mockups, and prototypes for client websites using Adobe XD.
Designed user interface components including navigation systems, menus, and interactive elements.
Assisted in the development of RFP materials and presentation assets to meet client deadlines.
Supported ongoing website updates and content management for both clients and the agency.

education.degree: Bachelor of Fine Arts in Graphic Design
